tldr_zh: 微軟加入AI裁員潮裁4800人；Anthropic被爆監控Claude用戶；Google允許用戶數據訓練AI
tldr_en: Microsoft joins AI-driven layoff wave cutting 4,800 jobs; Anthropic exposed for secret Claude tracking; Google enables user data for AI training

items.title_zh: 微軟裁員4800人，成科技業AI浪潮最新受害者
items.title_en: Microsoft cuts 4,800 employees as tech industry AI restructuring continues
items.summary_zh: 微軟宣布裁減約4800名員工，佔員工總數2.1%，成為這波科技業AI驅動重組的最新動作。微軟正大力投資AI基礎建設並利用AI提升業務效率，此次裁員反映公司正重新調整人力資源以配合AI發展戰略。
items.summary_en: Microsoft announced layoffs of approximately 4,800 employees, representing 2.1% of its workforce, becoming the latest major tech company to restructure amid AI investment. The cuts reflect Microsoft's strategic shift toward AI infrastructure and efficiency improvements.

items.title_zh: Xbox遊戲工作室大重組，Double Fine和Compulsion分拆獨立
items.title_en: Microsoft spins off four Xbox studios; Double Fine and Compulsion go indie while retaining franchises
items.summary_zh: 微軟宣布分拆四家Xbox遊戲工作室，包括Double Fine、Compulsion Games、Ninja Theory和Undead Labs。其中Double Fine和Compulsion作為獨立工作室，將保留其遊戲特許經營權和現有遊戲目錄，反映微軟重組遊戲業務並聚焦核心IP的策略。
items.summary_en: Microsoft is spinning off four Xbox game studios as part of restructuring. Double Fine and Compulsion will retain their franchises and game catalogs after going independent, while the company refocuses on its biggest franchises.

items.title_zh: Anthropic遭爆秘密追蹤Claude用戶，違反反監控立場
items.title_en: Anthropic caught secretly tracking Claude users, contradicting anti-surveillance stance
items.summary_zh: 資安研究人員發現Anthropic在Claude中嵌入秘密追蹤機制監控特定用戶，特別是中文用戶。此舉與Anthropic一直宣稱的隱私保護和反監控立場相悖，引發用戶對公司誠信性的質疑，Anthropic聲稱該實驗已終止。
items.summary_en: Security researchers exposed that Anthropic secretly embedded a tracker in Claude to monitor users, particularly Chinese-speaking ones. The discovery contradicts Anthropic's public stance on privacy and anti-surveillance, with the company claiming the experiment has ended.

items.title_zh: Google允許用戶數據訓練AI，提供隱私設置選項退出
items.title_en: Google enables user data for AI training; privacy opt-out option available
items.summary_zh: Google更新隱私設置，允許企業使用用戶數據（包括圖片、文件、音頻和視頻）來訓練其AI模型。用戶可通過隱私設置選擇退出此功能，引發對數據使用透明度和隱私保護的關注。
items.summary_en: Google updated privacy settings to allow companies to use user data including images, files, and audio/video to improve AI models. Users can opt out through privacy settings, raising concerns about data transparency and privacy protection.

items.title_zh: Apple在iOS 27測試版中允許自訂Siri語速和表達方式
items.title_en: Apple adds Siri customization in iOS 27 beta for pace and expressivity
items.summary_zh: Apple在最新iOS 27測試版中推出Siri語音自訂功能，用戶可調整語速和表達方式。此舉是Apple重建基於生成式AI的助手的一部分，旨在讓Siri感覺更自然和個性化。
items.summary_en: Apple introduced Siri customization in iOS 27 beta, allowing users to adjust pace and expressivity. This is part of Apple's broader effort to rebuild its assistant around generative AI to make it feel more natural and personal.

items.title_zh: SK海力士將赴美IPO，成另一AI芯片製造商
items.title_en: SK Hynix heads to US IPO, riding AI memory chip boom
items.summary_zh: 南韓存儲芯片製造商SK海力士宣布將在美上市，預計本週五舉行。該公司受惠於AI芯片需求增加，成為繼其他芯片製造商後，又一家乘AI浪潮進軍美股市場的企業。
items.summary_en: South Korean memory chipmaker SK Hynix is heading to the US for a multibillion-dollar IPO expected Friday. The company is capitalizing on the AI boom driving demand for advanced memory chips.

items.title_zh: FCC計畫廢除強制ISP列示所有費用的規定
items.title_en: FCC moves to end Biden-era rule requiring ISPs to disclose all fees
items.summary_zh: 美國聯邦通訊委員會（FCC）計畫廢除拜登時期的規定，該規定要求網際網路服務提供商（ISP）透明列示所有通行費。FCC此舉將允許ISP改為使用「最高價格」這類模糊收費方式。
items.summary_en: The FCC plans to rescind a Biden-era rule requiring ISPs to disclose all passthrough fees transparently. The move would allow ISPs to use vague pricing like "up to" pricing instead of itemized fees.

items.title_zh: 首次AI自主勒索軟體攻擊仍需人類介入關鍵步驟
items.title_en: First AI-run ransomware attack required human involvement for key steps
items.summary_zh: 研究人員詳細披露首個AI執行的真實勒索軟體攻擊案例，發現儘管AI代理執行了技術操作，但人類仍需選擇受害者、設置基礎設施和提供被盜憑證，說明目前AI自主性遠未達到完全自主犯罪的程度。
items.summary_en: Detailed analysis shows that the first known AI-executed ransomware attack still required human involvement for critical steps including victim selection, infrastructure setup, and credential theft, indicating AI autonomy remains limited.

items.title_zh: OpenAI CEO Altman承諾美國民眾將分享AI創造的財富
items.title_en: OpenAI's Altman reiterates promise of American wealth sharing from AI
items.summary_zh: OpenAI執行長Sam Altman重申其一直推動的承諾：美國民眾將分享AI創造的財富。報導指出Altman正在推進相關計畫，讓普通美國家庭能對OpenAI進行約300美元的投資。
items.summary_en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman reaffirmed his long-discussed promise that Americans will share in the wealth created by AI, with reports indicating a planned mechanism for ordinary families to invest approximately $300 in OpenAI.

items.title_zh: 伊朗最高領袖哈米尼遺體運抵聖城科姆，民眾呼籲復仇
items.title_en: Khamenei's body transported to Qom; Iranians call for revenge amid tensions
items.summary_zh: 伊朗已故最高領袖哈米尼的遺體運抵什葉派聖城科姆，預定隔日舉行送葬儀式。送葬隊伍中群眾高呼反對談判，呼籲報復，反映伊朗民眾的激烈反美情緒。
items.summary_en: Former Iranian Supreme Leader Khamenei's body was transported to the holy city of Qom with funeral ceremonies scheduled for the next day. Crowds called for revenge and opposed negotiations, reflecting intense anti-American sentiment in Iran.

items.title_zh: 古巴全國電網全面癱瘓，1000萬人陷入停電
items.title_en: Cuba's entire electrical grid collapses, leaving 10 million without power
items.summary_zh: 古巴電網營運商報告全國電網在中午時分全面癱瘓，導致該加勒比海島國約1000萬人口陷入停電。此次大規模停電反映古巴面臨嚴峻的能源危機。
items.summary_en: Cuba's entire electrical grid collapsed at midday, leaving approximately 10 million people without power. The nationwide blackout reflects the Caribbean island nation's severe energy crisis.

items.title_zh: 法國總統馬克宏訪敘利亞，歐盟首位訪問新政權領導人
items.title_en: Macron visits Syria, first EU leader to visit post-Assad government
items.summary_zh: 法國總統馬克宏抵達敘利亞大馬士革訪問，成為2024年反叛軍推翻前總統阿塞德後，首位造訪敘利亞的歐洲聯盟國家元首，象徵國際社會對新敘利亞政權的認可。
items.summary_en: French President Macron arrived in Damascus, becoming the first EU head of state to visit Syria since the rebellion toppled former president Bashar al-Assad in 2024, signaling international recognition of Syria's new government.
